title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Banks Start Trading Part of $35 Billion Chip Funding Package
summary: Wall Street banks have started buying and selling an initial piece of a $35 billion financing package for Broadcom Inc. and Anthropic PBC’s AI infrastructure expansion, with the biggest private credit deal ever now being offered to a wider pool of investors.

title: IATA Set to Pick WEF Director as First Female to Succeed Walsh
summary: The governing board of the International Air Transport Association is poised to select Saadia Zahidi as its new director general, the first female to lead the organization, according to people familiar with the matter, succeeding Willie Walsh, who will move to India’s IndiGo.

title: Southeast Asian Scam Networks Cost Victims Up to $114B in a Year: UN

title: Strategy, BlackRock form Bitcoin Security Consortium to prepare for quantum computing threat

title: Proof of Reserves: What It Means for Exchange Trust
summary: The Trust Deficit For most of the crypto industry’s history, users who deposited assets with an exchange simply trusted that the funds were there.
